name: cypher-trading-noncustodial
description: 🎙️ Non-Custodial Crypto Trading Voice Assistant — powered by OVOS, Electron + React, and Multi-Chain DEX aggregators

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:voice"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../skills && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint

author: Cypher Trading DAO
